'''Mawz Dakko''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]], living during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he worked for the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] crimelord [[Sebolto]], and owed the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] a large sum of money for hijacking spice shipments. When a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was placed on his head, he was killed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who claimed the bounty.

==Behind the scenes==
Mawz Dakko's bounty was 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,500 dead, depending on the player's decision.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
